records.question: Which programs named Kaku, launched in 2004 and owned by Beijing Television (BTV) with origin in Beijing, have broadcast shares at most 4.2 percent during dates containing May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE broadcast_share.date LIKE '%May%' AND broadcast_share.share_in_percent <= 4.2 AND program.launch = 2004.0 AND program.name = 'Kaku' AND program.origin = 'Beijing' AND program.owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast_share bs ON p.Program_ID = bs.Program_ID
WHERE p.Name = 'Kaku'
AND p.Launch = 2004
AND p.Owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)'
AND p.Origin = 'Beijing'
AND bs.Share_in_percent <= 4.2
AND bs.Date LIKE '%May%'

records.question: Which programs named Kaku, originating from Beijing, owned by Beijing Television (BTV), launched in 2004 or earlier, were broadcast at night during May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE program.owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' AND broadcast_share.date LIKE '%May%' AND broadcast.time_of_day = 'Night' AND program.origin = 'Beijing' AND program.launch <= 2004.0 AND program.name = 'Kaku'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast b ON p.Program_ID = b.Program_ID
JOIN broadcast_share bs ON p.Program_ID = bs.Program_ID AND b.Channel_ID = bs.Channel_ID
WHERE p.Name = 'Kaku'
AND p.Origin = 'Beijing'
AND p.Owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)'
AND p.Launch <= 2004
AND b.Time_of_day = 'Night'
AND bs.Date LIKE '%-05-%'

records.question: Which programs that have related broadcasts and broadcast shares were launched in 2005.0 or later and originated exactly in Shanghai?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE program.launch >= 2005.0 AND program.origin = 'Shanghai'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast b ON p.Program_ID = b.Program_ID
JOIN broadcast_share bs ON p.Program_ID = bs.Program_ID
WHERE p.Launch >= 2005.0 AND p.Origin = 'Shanghai'

records.question: Which programs named Kaku originate from Beijing and are broadcast in the Morning?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
WHERE broadcast.time_of_day = 'Morning' AND program.name = 'Kaku' AND program.origin = 'Beijing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.Program_ID
FROM program AS T1
JOIN broadcast AS T2 ON T1.Program_ID = T2.Program_ID
WHERE T1.Name = 'Kaku' AND T1.Origin = 'Beijing' AND T2.Time_of_day = 'Morning'

records.question: Which programs originate exactly from Beijing and have been broadcast on any channel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN channel ON broadcast.channel_id = channel.channel_id
WHERE program.origin = 'Beijing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast b ON p.Program_ID = b.Program_ID
WHERE p.Origin = 'Beijing'

records.question: Which programs named Jiajia, owned by Southern Media Corporation (SMC) and originating from Guangdong, aired on CCTV-3 with at least 0.31% channel rating, a launch year no later than 2007, broadcast dates containing '01', and share in percent at most 1.1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
JOIN channel ON broadcast_share.channel_id = channel.channel_id
WHERE broadcast_share.date LIKE '%01%' AND channel.name = 'CCTV-3' AND program.name = 'Jiajia' AND program.origin = 'Guangdong' AND broadcast_share.share_in_percent <= 1.1 AND channel.rating_in_percent >= 0.31 AND program.launch <= 2007.0 AND program.owner = 'Southern Media Corporation (SMC)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast b ON p.Program_ID = b.Program_ID
JOIN channel c ON b.Channel_ID = c.Channel_ID
JOIN broadcast_share bs ON p.Program_ID = bs.Program_ID AND c.Channel_ID = bs.Channel_ID
WHERE p.Name = 'Jiajia'
AND p.Owner = 'Southern Media Corporation (SMC)'
AND p.Origin = 'Guangdong'
AND c.Name = 'CCTV-3'
AND c.Rating_in_percent >= 0.31
AND p.Launch <= 2007
AND bs.Date LIKE '%01%'
AND bs.Share_in_percent <= 1.1

records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program

records.pred_sql: SELECT Program_ID FROM program WHERE Origin = 'Jiangsu'

records.question: What programs named Youman from Jiangsu Broadcasting Corporation (JSBC) launched in 2010 or later and originated in Jiangsu are there?

SELECT program.program_id FROM program
WHERE program.owner = 'Jiangsu Broadcasting Corporation (JSBC)' AND program.launch >= 2010.0 AND program.origin = 'Jiangsu' AND program.name = 'Youman'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Program_ID
FROM program
WHERE Name = 'Youman' 
  AND Owner = 'Jiangsu Broadcasting Corporation (JSBC)'
  AND Launch >= 2010
  AND Origin = 'Jiangsu'

records.question: Which programs launched in 2005 or later have associated broadcast shares?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE program.launch >= 2005.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast_share bs ON p.Program_ID = bs.Program_ID
WHERE p.Launch >= 2005

records.question: Which programs owned by Beijing Television (BTV) launched in 2004 or earlier have a broadcast share exactly equal to 2.8 percent?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE program.owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' AND broadcast_share.share_in_percent = 2.8 AND program.launch <= 2004.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Program_ID
FROM program p
JOIN broadcast_share bs ON p.Program_ID = bs.Program_ID
WHERE p.Owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)'
AND p.Launch <= 2004
AND bs.Share_in_percent = 2.8
